query:
ALTER TABLE activities MODIFY COLUMN category ENUM('solo', 'social', 'movement', 'screens') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'solo';
UPDATE activities SET category = 'solo' WHERE category NOT IN ('solo', 'social', 'movement', 'screens');
